# TASK-NNNN: <Task title>

- **Status:** Backlog | Ready | In progress | In review | Done
- **Milestone:** M<N> — <milestone name>
- **Area:** <module or system area>
- **Depends on:** TASK-NNNN, ADR-NNNN (or "none")
- **Estimated size:** S | M | L | XL

## Goal

One paragraph: what exists when this task is done that does not exist now,
and why it matters to the product.

## Context

Links to the PRD section, architecture section, and ADRs that govern this
task. A task without governing documents is a signal the documents are
incomplete — fix the documents first.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Observable, testable statements. "Works" is not a criterion.
- [ ] Includes error, empty, and loading states where UI is involved.
- [ ] Includes tests (unit / integration / e2e as appropriate).
- [ ] Includes accessibility checks where UI is involved.
- [ ] Documentation updated (list which files).

## Out of scope

Explicitly list what this task does NOT include, to prevent scope creep.

## Notes

Open questions, risks, suggested approach.
